asset_name: BPC-157 Human Knee Pain Evidence Lead
status: HUMAN PUBLICATION IDENTIFIED — METHODOLOGICAL AND PRIMARY-SOURCE REVIEW PENDING

study.publication_title: Intra-Articular Injection of BPC 157 for Multiple Types of Knee Pain
study.journal: Alternative Therapies in Health and Medicine
study.model: Human clinical report / observational evidence lead

evidence_summary: A human knee-pain publication has been identified, but it is not treated as confirmatory efficacy evidence in this bootstrap build.
limitations: Study design, control group, sample size, outcome validation and bias require direct appraisal.
This evidence must not be represented as randomized confirmatory clinical evidence.
